top_items.title: ActWorld: From Explorable to Interactive World Model via Action-Aware Memory

definition: World models are AI systems that learn an internal representation of an environment's dynamics to predict how it changes over time, addressing the question of whether models need such representations to plan and reason rather than just pattern-match.
